---
title: "About"
---

## Biography

I am an undergraduate student at the University of Idaho studying Political Science and International Studies. My academic interests center on public opinion, political psychology, and how people evaluate elections and democratic legitimacy.

## Education
- B.S. Political Science and International Studies, University of Idaho (expected 2027)

## Skills
- R, Python, SPSS, Stata
- Quantitative research design and regression modeling
- Survey analysis and data visualization
- LaTeX and academic writing

## Languages
- Bengali (native)
- English (professional)
- Hindi (professional)
- Urdu (professional)
- Arabic (intermediate)
